/bin/bash -lc "python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Based on analysis of all citations in the BibTeX file:
# 
# REAL citations (well-known, verifiable):
# - Jumper2021: AlphaFold in Nature 2021 - real

# - cmmlu: CMMLU ACL 2024 - real (has proper ACL DOI + dblp)
# - chid: ChID ACL 2019 - real (has proper ACL DOI + dblp)
# - hellaswag: HellaSwag ACL 2019 - real (has proper ACL DOI + dblp)
# - Alberts2014: Molecular Biology of the Cell - real textbook
# - Sambrook2001: Molecular Cloning - real textbook
# - Vaswani2017: Attention is All You Need NeurIPS 2017 - real
# - He2016: Deep ResNet CVPR 2016 - real
# - jing-etal-2025-mcip: MCIP EMNLP 2025 - real (has proper ACL DOI + aclanthology URL)
# - steg: Provably Secure Steganography IEEE Trans. Computers 2009 - real (has proper IEEE DOI + dblp)
# - adversarial: Adversarial watermarking transformer IEEE S&P 2021 - real
# - paraphraser: NL Watermarking via Paraphraser Artificial Intelligence 2023 - real
# - kaptchuk2021meteor: Meteor CCS 2021 - real
# - boolq: BoolQ NAACL 2019 - real (has proper ACL DOI + dblp)
# - zhao-etal-2025-efficiently: Efficiently Identifying Watermarked Segments ACL 2025 - real
# - wang-etal-2025-agentvigil: AGENTVIGIL EMNLP 2025 - real
# - zhao-etal-2023-pre: Pre-trained LMs Zero-Shot ACL 2023 - real
# - gureja-etal-2025-rewardbench: M-RewardBench ACL 2025 - real
#
# FAKE/HALLUCINATED citations:

#   - Authors \"Aisha Patel and Carlos Ramirez\" are generic/unknown
#   - DOI missing, no URL, no dblp entry
#   - \"International Conference on Information Systems\" 2023 in London by ACM - doesn't match real ICIS
#   - Generic title, suspicious
#
# - wilson2021neural: \"Neural Networks in Deep Learning: A Comprehensive Review\"
#   - Authors \"Emily Wilson and Robert Taylor\" are generic/unknown
#   - Journal \"AI Research Journal\" doesn't exist as a real journal
#   - DOI \"10.5678/airj.2021.12.4.200\" - prefix 10.5678 is not a real CrossRef registrant
#   - Completely hallucinated
#
# - smith2020ai: \"Advances in Artificial Intelligence for Natural Language Processing\"
#   - Authors \"John Smith and Alice Johnson\" are placeholder names
#   - Journal \"Journal of Computational Linguistics\" - the real journal is just \"Computational Linguistics\"
#   - DOI \"10.1234/jcl.2020.45.3.112\" - prefix 10.1234 is not a real CrossRef registrant
#   - Completely hallucinated

    \"Advances in Artificial Intelligence for Natural Language Processing\",
    \"Blockchain Applications in Supply Chain Management\",
    \"Neural Networks in Deep Learning: A Comprehensive Review\",
]

result = {\"fake_citations\": sorted(fake_citations)}
print(json.dumps(result, indent=2))
EOF"
